title: Guardian Pharmacy is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Guardian Pharmacy is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!
